extraction.one_line_summary: VAN DER POEL Mathieu attacked inside 4km on descent using 62-tooth chainring, caught, then countered again with BENOOT to win two-up sprint
tactical_patterns: INEOS (TURNER/PIDCOCK) initiated decisive selection on Oude Kwaremont cobbles at 60km, not traditional late-race positioning for British team
CAMPENAERTS chipped tooth descending in 62-tooth chainring inside 10km, signal that extreme gearing choices effective on technical descents pre-finale
VAN DER POEL required multiple attacks (inside 4km, then again after being caught) to finally establish winning move with BENOOT
POGACAR closed solo from peloton to within 10 seconds of leaders mid-race despite cobble inexperience, abandoned chase around 30km mark

rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: neutral: first cobbled race showed raw power closing 10-second gaps solo but inexperience prevented full bridge, abandoned chase 30km out
rider_signals.CAMPENAERTS Victor: positive: established gap on descent in 62-tooth chainring before being caught, finished 4th showing TT specialists can survive cobbled classics
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Tom: positive: INEOS initiated decisive Kwaremont selection and finished 3rd, marking team's evolving cobbled race tactics beyond support role
rider_signals.BENOOT Tiesj: positive: only rider able to follow VAN DER POEL's final attacks, nearly won sprint after matching multiple accelerations inside 4km
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: negative: attempted chase on Kanarieberg but unable to close gaps, signal of declining ability to bridge in decisive moments
